author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Koiseyo Mayakashi Tenshi-domo' Gets TV Anime Adaptation in 2027
Publishing company Kodansha announced a television anime adaptation of Coco Uzuki's Koiseyo Mayakashi Tenshi-domo (Fall in Love, You False Angels) manga on Thursday, revealing a commemorative illustration (pictured) by Uzuki. The anime will premiere in 2027. Uzuki began serializing the shoujo romance manga in April 2023 in Kodansha's magazine Dessert, and the seventh volume shipped on June 12. Koiseyo Mayakashi Tenshi-domo has reached 2.25 million copies in circulation worldwide. Kodan...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Suterare Seijo no Isekai Gohan Tabi' Announces Supporting Cast Pair
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Yoneori's Suterare Seijo no Isekai Gohan Tabi: Kakure Skill de Camping Car wo Shoukan shimashita (The Forsaken Saintess and her Foodie Roadtrip in Another World) light novel announced a pair of additional cast on Thursday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 6 at 11:00 p.m. on AT-X, followed by BS Nippon Television, CBC Television, and Tokyo MX. Voice actors Yukari Tamura (Higurashi no Naku Koro ni) and Kanehira Yamam...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Hametsu no Oukoku' Concludes Seven-Year Serialization
yoruhashi's Hametsu no Oukoku (The Kingdoms of Ruin) manga will conclude its nearly seven-year run with the 15th volume on July 9, according to Mag Garden's listing. yoruhashi began serializing the adventure fantasy manga in Comic Garden magazine in April 2019. The final chapter will be published on the MAGCOMI website on July 14. Seven Seas Entertainment licensed the manga in English in 2020, with the 13th volume planned for an October 13 release. Produced by Yokohama Animation Lab, a...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kanojo no Tomodachi' Announces Production Staff, Main Cast for Fall 2026
WWWaveCorporation's Deregula animation label opened an official website for the television anime adaptation of Jyura's Kanojo no Tomodachi (My Girlfriend's Friend) manga and revealed the production staff, main cast, and the first key visual (pictured) on Thursday. The anime begins to air in October 2026. Cast Takeru Hidaka: Ryuuga Nagaike Kaori Koga: Sayaka Hashi Tomoko Yoshioka: Miki Hase (Boku no Kanojo ga Majimesugiru Sho-bitch na Ken) Staff Director: Takashi Andou (Inu ni Natt...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Light Novel 'Saikyou Mahoushi no Inton Keikaku' Gets TV Anime Adaptation in 2027
An official website opened for a television anime adaptation of Izushiro's Saikyou Mahoushi no Inton Keikaku (The Greatest Magicmaster's Retirement Plan) light novel on Wednesday, revealing the main cast, staff, a teaser visual (pictured), teaser promotional video, and a celebratory illustration (pictured) by Ruria Miyuki. The anime is scheduled to premiere on the CBC and TBS network nationwide under the "Agaru Anime" programming block in 2027. Voice actor Yuuto Uemura (Vinla...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari' Reveals Additional Staff, Second Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Jinushi's Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari (Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You) manga revealed addition staff and a second promotional video on Thursday. The first six episodes were streamed as 12 mini-episodes on Abema on June 3, and regular broadcasting is scheduled to begin on July 9 on TBS, followed by AT-X. Staff Prop Design: Mahiru Shinya (Rikei ga Koi ni Ochita no de Shoumei Shite Mita.) Art Director: Masaru Toya (Seishu...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Cyborg 009: Nemesis' Announces Additional Cast
The official website of the Cyborg 009: Nemesis anime series revealed additional cast and a new character visual (pictured right) on Friday. The anime adapting Shoutarou Ishinomori's action sci-fi manga will begin streaming in Summer 2026. Cast Pyunma/008: Yuu Hayashi (Tokyo Revengers) Great Britain/007: Kentarou Tone (Utawarerumono: Itsuwari no Kamen) Chang Changku/006: Mitsuaki Kanuka (Kusuriya no Hitorigoto) Geronimo Jr./005: Hiroki Yasumoto (One Punch Man) Albert Heinrich/004: Tomokazu...
